economic_notes: Mississaugi Retail Cannabis Corporation is a 100% owned government business enterprise accounted for on modified equity basis. Revenue $1,129,731 and net income $90,393 in 2022. Band operated enterprises segment generated $551,507 revenue.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Mississaugi Retail Cannabis Corporation is accounted for on modified equity basis (GBE). Deferred revenue increased significantly from $2,613,662 to $7,045,904, largely due to unspent ISC and capital project funding including 5-plex construction ($1,725,360) and duplex construction ($254,157). CMHC restricted cash reserve of $353,951 held separately. Trust funds held by Federal Government under Indian Act Section 62. Robinson Huron Treaty guarantee of $745,500 (4.45% share). Remuneration schedule referenced in cover letter but not included in extracted text. Net financial assets per statement of change: $3,997,797 (budget showed $7,592,381). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $6,791,705 + Gov Canada Other $447,328 + Province of Ontario $2,326,304 + North Shore Tribal Council $1,273,642 = $10,838,979; OFNLP $551,723 added if treated as government transfer giving $11,390,702; excluded OFNLP from transfers giving OSR inclusive of band enterprises, trust, investment income, and other revenue.
